import re, unicodedata

# Arabic diacritics set
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r"[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06DC\u06DF-\u06E8\u06EA-\u06ED]")
tatweel = "\u0640"

def normalize(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    # Remove tatweel and diacritics
    s = s.replace(tatweel, "")
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub("", s)
    # unify various alef/hamza forms to bare alif and yeh, heh?
    s = s.replace("أ","ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("آ","ا").replace("ٱ","ا")
    s = s.replace("ى","ي").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ؤ","و").replace("ة","ه")
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r"[^\w\s]", " ", s, flags=re.UNICODE)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip().lower()
    return s

snippet = "إِنَّ اللَ"
norm_snip = normalize(snippet)
norm_snip
